3222930.name: Kill Meow
3222930.description:
Cats have 7 lives, try to lose them all!

You are a very hungry cat and in heaven there is your absolute favorite food waiting for you.
So get creative and stupid to lose all your cat lives and make your way to your well deserved dinner!
Good luck to kill meow your way to heaven!

*** no cats were harmed in the process of making this game ***
developers: Jonas Wallach, Anna Avagyan, Sabine Ehli
